reviews.review_description: This game is fun, but it should give people a reason to buy it in VR instead of other platforms. It would be more enjoyable if it were in first person, or at least make an option to switch between first and third person
Whats the point of virtual reality if its not first person

So i played the original version on ps4 and i loved it, so i was pretty excited when a VR version got announced and i thought "i wonder how the game is gonna be in first person!"... until i found out i wasnt gonna be in first person but in third. Now im not saying every VR game has to be in first person, but it would definitely be nice to let players choose between first and third person. Also another thing but it currently doesnt have all the levels the other versions have, tho thats a minor issue since i think those are gonna get added later on. So, to recap, the game is great but it missing first person kinda sucks, tho i still recommend the game!
This game sucks cause it is not in first person and the controls don't make any sense and to be fair the ps4 version was better.
IT TOOK MY $45.00  I WANT MY MONEY ,but good game

reviews.review_title: Add more maps and first person
reviews.review_description: It just bad cause of that

As much as I liked the PC version, this one is barely playable due to clumsy controls. And online lobbies are either empty or pure torture in a form of toxic creaming kids who are constantly trying to grab and toss you down. 2/5 experience just because I like the PC version.
Good game and sub to tylros3
This game was very fun and just a good amount of complexity. It could do way better if it got montly levels and frequent updates

reviews.review_title: People need to think things through
reviews.review_description: Honestly this game is really fun. The third person really makes this game unique from other vr games. When other people say that the third person ruins the game for them I find it odd because, the original game is a ragdoll game. You aren't in full control of the character you are playing. It's almost like you are controlling a doll. You aren't really playing as the character, so for the creaters to turn it into a third person made more sense than a first person. First person makes no sense when it comes to human fall flat. The concept of a third person ragdoll controlling vr game was really cool to me, so the game its self was really fun to play even if it wasn't like the traditional vr games. In my opinion it's still one of the best games I've played.

the only downside was it wasn't in first person i was really hoping it would be the one on pc is in first person but it's not in this game so why is it not?
🐸
No instructions on how to do most levels and trash mechanics L game

reviews.review_title: Just get it on a other device
reviews.review_description: I had this game on my phone and I loved it, when i saw it was on VR i decided to get but its very different from other consoles. It is very hard to control, I couldnt figure out how to grab on to things, and your teammates dont do anything, they just play around with the items and dont actually try to do the obstacles. Last thing i hate how it is 3rd person it just dosent give VR.
Very fun but not many peppol play it any more
Defentily play it it’s very good
It should be first person on the characters
Bro make it first person this thing sucks

This is great in single player, but the multiplayer co-op is everything I want in a game, easy enough to access, fun to play through in cooperative team building shared adventures, excellent for sublime moments of competitive skill or delicious well timed acts of spite in revenge long (thought) forgotten acts of betrayal to people who now know what it feels like to...ahem, haven't had this much multiplayer fun since N64 golden eye and WWF no mercy...this game has unlimited potential too, should be made available in schools and workplaces... should be made 32 players or more, great possibilities for larger team games, hope there is a remake on the quest 4 in the future that can accommodate this...there is no violence in this game, just an excellent adventure for people of all ages where you can be as noble or petty as you wanna be...I've owned a quest, quest two, bought 3 quest 3's, and two quest 3s's as gifts....this is GENUINELY my favourite vr title ... definitely for multiplayer!

When I was a little kid, I remember playing Human Fall Flat on my Xbox One. I loved this game. Climbing around, doing silly things, and hanging out with my friends in the game. Doing the cool levels levels with my friends was so fun. I hummed the theme music when I played. There were so many cool levels I remember like the factory. Now it has come to VR. If you played Human Fall Flat on Flatscreen and enjoyed it, I highly recommend getting this game for yourself.

reviews.review_title: Add a new map on head set
reviews.review_description: please add a new map called candyland me and my friend really want to play candyland when it comes out
Not what it was
bad
I like the game on  Xbox, I see this is available on vr, but when I get the game I much prefer  Xbox instead. I wish the game would let you play as the character

As someone who loves this game and has played it on other platforms, I find the controls really difficult, and I didn’t like that it’s in first-person view — I wish it was better in that aspect. Also, the lack of new maps and the difficulty finding players online make it less enjoyable. I won’t be playing it again; it’s just not for me.
if I could give it less than one star, I would!!
So i wouldve really liked it if it was in first person. Or we should have an option to change our POV

This is coming from someone who’s played the Human Fall Flat orignal version many times over, played all the maps, had many wonderful memories of  multiplayer games and exploring the secrets and overall having a blast.

So when I found out there was a VR version, I had to try! Fortunately it’s under Horizon+ so I didn’t actually have to shell out money for it, but if I did? I would have requested an instant refund.

The major issue with it is their decision to somehow make the characters in third person instead of first, and then have us control their arms only by “holding hands” with the character.

Never been so quickly let down by a game before in my life. Really poor choice by the devs to implement such a lacking game mechanic.

Avoid like the plague! So many better games out there.

reviews.review_title: First Person Wouldn't Work for this Game
reviews.review_description: As the title states, ignore the people complaining that the game isn't first person. If it were your character would have finely tuned motor skills and that would kill the whole point of the game. You're supposed to maneuver like a drunk toddler.

I have played the original games for a long time and when I heard curve was making a Vr game I had to get it I got it the first day it came out and was disappointed that I was not in first person I’ll play the game now and then but no one plays it

reviews.review_title: Multiplayer game w/ single player option
reviews.review_description:
This is how the game should be marketed.  It is ridiculously fun as a multiplayer game.  The majority of the fun is watching other players struggle with the wobbly movement of the characters.  This should NOT be a 1st person game that many reviewers are suggesting.

If you are looking for a party game with multiple people, this game will have you in tears laughing.  If you’re playing single player, no one gets to see your misery as you try and advance through the levels.

A must try game with more than 1 person; especially if you have a horizon + subscription!

Played again last night for hours!  I would pay full price if it’s taken off Horizon+.  It’s that good as a multiplayer game!
Bad

It’s actually really fun and the controls are fine but what brings this down for me Is that some levels aren’t In this version like factory, city, laboratory and lumber hopefully these levels will get added In a future update and If they do I will change my rating up.

I've only ever played this on PlayStation but it was good game there so me buy 😁😁

I was really excited to try Human Fall Flat on my VR headset, but unfortunately, the experience felt very empty. I jumped into the game expecting some multiplayer fun, but I found myself completely alone — no other players online.
While the mechanics and VR adaptation were interesting, the real charm of Human Fall Flat comes from the chaotic fun with others. Without multiplayer interaction, the world felt lifeless and a bit boring.
I hope more players join the VR version in the future because this game truly shines when shared with others. Until then, if you’re planning to play solo, just know it might not deliver the full experience you’re hoping for.
Human fall flat vr is an excellent game. The only thing I feel it's really missing is an option for a 1st person viewpoint in the game. Other than that, it's amazing.
i tried playing but the game was freaking awful i couldn't do anything multiple players awful takes up too much memory and i want a first person this game sucks don't waste your money

I found the puzzles interesting and I wanted to keep going, each one solved instantly makes me want to do the next of slightly increasing difficulty.
But...
The 3rd person puppet controls were fun at first. Then they became mildly irritating for me at their best and quite frustrating at other times.

reviews.review_title: More fun and hilarious than flatscreen
reviews.review_description: The people rating this 1 star don’t understand the game. Almost every 1 star review is because they’re upset the game is in third person. I’ll admit, I was turned off by that at first too, but I quickly realized it was a decision made to maintain the awkwardness which was a huge part of the identity of the original. The game would lose 95% of its charm if you were going through it with absolute precision and playing in first person would eliminate the wacky physics. Plus it actually controls better than the OG. Just go into it with the idea that your navigating a marionette puppet through the levels, grab a friend or two and you guys will have an amazing time!
I bought this yesterday i really love it the only down side is there isnt thar many multiplayet games. But yea love the game
Not gonna yap just read the title

This game is so funny with friends when this came out I wish it was 1st person but then I remember the flat screen version is also 3rd person so I got the game and it’s awesome  I thought it whould be boring but every single second I was dying of laughter if you like funny and weird multiplayer games totally recommend the only downside they don’t have all the extra dreams so please add all of them

I went into this thinking it wouldn’t be that great because of the puppeteering aspect of it, but after playing it I actually think if it was a first person game rather than this it would’ve been bad. The way the exact same difficulty and jankiness of its flatscreen counterpart gets captured is flawless, and it truly would not be Human Fall Flat without it. I did experience some connection issues but otherwise it was a great experience and definitely recommend it!
Just like it on Xbox
but please make a local multiplayer, because there is a delay over the internet. We want to play together with our friends in the same room, but it's not possible to play

human fall flat, nobody be online 😔 Don’t get me wrong, it’s a great game and all but it just lacks players 👩‍🦯‍➡️I also wish that the player limit was more because it’s no fun with only 3 people 🤷‍♀️
Finished it in coop. I was afraid of 3rd person but it works great, just hoping there will be more content  in the future (despite not so good numbers)

reviews.review_title: Good map import, terrible concept import
reviews.review_description: Human fall flat is a very funny and goofy game to begin with that makes it challenging and whimsical. But what if I were to tell you while that maybe the this game wasn’t actually first person vr like you would expect? Well there must be an option for it in settings? Nope! You’re playing third person, so why spend ($10 during Christmas specials) or ($12) regular price for something not truly vr and also half the time doesn’t grab onto the wall or move the characters arm like you’re moving your arms in real life? Exactly, don’t please! Or maybe developers could justify and fix the issue patch? I would change my mind absolutely then, until then.

Human fall flat vr is better than regular console or computer it’s much more immersive and you have a lot more control over your arms!
But one thing is needed if possible.. you could have an option to make it first person please? I feel like it’s another more immersive experience if you add that option. But just a suggestion tho..
I dont know why there is no people but we dont need some people in the game you can still play without anyone this is a 5 star
I think it’s the best game because you have so much control of your arms. It’s easy to make friends and there’s not really any bullies on it is a very good game for kids and beginners to oculus ￼
I wanted to pre order this game because I thought it would be in first person and not third. Now I'm stuck with a $10 game that I don't even play and can't refund.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games out there
reviews.review_description: So I saw this on YouTube and thought it looked really bad but I bought it anyway to play with my friend. I meant to only play the tutorial but I played three levels and wow. This is actually amazing. I never thought that anything could make this fun. The only issue is that no one is making lobbies but apart from that amazing.
Super fun but i want their to be a first person mode it would make it soo much better

Idk why everyone is complaining about the 3rd person. The 3rd person controls fit this game perfectly and is very well done. Having first person would just turn this game into box carrying simulator and would make it super boring

I got this game a few days ago to play with my friend, and had an absolute blast out first time playing it (we were stuck on demolition for so like an hour and a half). We thought it was very cool because of the unique 3rd person perspective (good thing not a bad thing). Not only have we continued to play this game but we have actually ENJOYED playing this game, it is a perfect combination of problem solving, difficulty, and fun that makes the game feel different then most other games. If you have a friend or two to play this game with, I would absolutely buy it, 10/10
It is so fun! I love I so much!!

I don’t know who is giving this 5 stars but it’s definitely not 5 stars. I play this game on my Xbox and enjoy it so I thought I might like it in vr but it’s awful. The camera bugs out too much and the controls are wack. Real life movement must be too fast for the game to keep up with because it just doesn’t register the right movement most of the time. It’s not even a haha funny kind of bad it’s just straight up bad.
Didn’t let me refund the game

This game is showing how simple fun can be. It's janky, somewhat unresponsive like the flat game, but in VR. And don't take that as a negative review. It is extremely positive. The game offers you pure joy and funny moments to share with your friends/family or even alone!

It's basically like controlling a puppet going through puzzles.
